message:
feat(dashboard): run detail as sortable data table with search

Replace the simple 4-column task list with a 10-column sortable data table
showing computed metrics (rounds, wasted rounds, tokens, sessions, depth,
first submit round, wall time). Add real-time search box for filtering
tasks by name. All columns are sortable with ascending/descending toggle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
